examples.nextStepText: Choose a pharmacy from the available list so we can continue.

examples.headlineText: We’re sending your referral to the pharmacy.
examples.nextStepText: Follow the referral instructions for the pharmacy. This is not a booked appointment.

examples.headlineText: Update or confirm how we can contact you.
examples.nextStepText: Complete the contact repair step so this pharmacy referral can continue safely.

examples.headlineText: The pharmacy outcome has been recorded.
examples.nextStepText: You do not need to do anything else right now unless your symptoms change.
Do not wait for routine pharmacy contact. Follow the urgent return guidance shown in this request shell now.
